description:
You are a deployment engineer who is about to roll-out the next version of “inventory-svc”.
    The working copy of the service is **already cloned** for you at

        /home/user/repos/inventory-svc

    Your objective is to capture the **current** commit identifier of the default branch
    (the branch that is checked out when you enter the repository) and store it in a log
    file so the operations team can record exactly what was deployed.

    What you must do
    1. Change into the repository located at /home/user/repos/inventory-svc.  
    2. Using **a single git command**, write the *seven-character* abbreviated (short)
       SHA-1 hash of **HEAD** to a file called  

           /home/user/repos/inventory-svc/latest_commit.log
    3. Display the file’s contents to the terminal (so the CI pipeline can capture it).

    Very important format requirements
    • latest_commit.log must contain **only** the 7 lowercase hexadecimal characters
      followed immediately by a single newline character (“\n”).  
      – No leading or trailing spaces.  
      – No extra text, timestamps, or prompts.

    The automated test will fail if anything else is present in that file or if the file
    does not exist in exactly the path specified above.

    Hint: git provides a succinct plumbing command that prints the short hash of any
    reference—use redirection to create the log file in one step.
truth:
<!--
        Pre-seeded repository details
        --------------------------------
        Location      : /home/user/repos/inventory-svc
        Default branch: main  (already checked out; HEAD -> main)
        HEAD commit   : 2f3e5a7d9bc3483abdf1c1024e212e1e3f2b4d4
                        ^^^^^^^
                        short hash = 2f3e5a7

        Verification
        -------------
        After the agent finishes, the file
           /home/user/repos/inventory-svc/latest_commit.log
        MUST exist and its exact byte contents (including newline) must be

           2f3e5a7\n
    -->
name: task_000000_7c8a9fd5
